Creative Kaygency — Professional Digital Design Services

Access 40+ professional digital design services in a fun, gamified way. Websites, e-commerce stores, branding, SEO, content writing, email marketing and more. Save up to 20% with our credit system.

Our Service Categories

  • 🌐 Website Design Services — Custom websites & landing pages (4 services)
  • 🛒 E-Commerce Stores — Online stores & optimization (3 services)
  • 🎨 Logos, Graphics & Branding — Logos, brand kits & design (3 services)
  • 🔍 SEO Services — Search engine optimization (4 services)
  • 📝 Content & Copy — Copywriting & content creation (3 services)
  • 📧 Email Marketing — Automation & campaigns (3 services)
  • 📱 Social Media — Content packs & management (2 services)
  • ☁️ Website Hosting — Fast, secure managed hosting (4 services)
  • 📚 Digital Product Creation — We will design/build/create your entire digital product for you! (4 services)
  • ⚡ Additional Services — CRO, AI content & care plans (3 services)
  • ✍️ Blog Setup — Complete blog creation in any niche (3 services)
  • 🎬 Vlogging & Videography — Professional filming for YouTube & social media (4 services)

Explore all 40+ services

How It Works

  1. Create your free account — Sign up in seconds, no credit card required.
  2. Earn or buy credits — Subscribe for monthly credits or buy packages anytime.
  3. Choose your service — Browse 40+ services and submit your brief.
  4. Get professional results — Track progress from your dashboard and receive completed work.

Why Choose Creative Kaygency?

  • 40+ professional digital services across 12 categories
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
  • Earn credits daily through logins, referrals, and streaks
  • Fast turnaround from 1–3 days (Enterprise) to 5–7 days (Starter)
  • UK-based team with 500+ projects completed
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions

Popular Services

  • 🌐 Business Website — Professional multi-page website with responsive design, SEO optimization, and CMS integration. (640 credits)
  • 📄 Landing Page — High-converting single-page design focused on driving signups, sales, or leads. (240 credits)
  • 🔄 Sales Funnel — Complete multi-step sales funnel with landing pages, upsells, downsells, and thank-you pages. (480 credits)
  • 📰 Brochure Website — Elegant informational website perfect for showcasing your business, portfolio, or services. (400 credits)
  • 🛒 E-commerce Store — Full-featured online store with product management, payments, shipping, and order tracking. (1200 credits)
  • 📦 Product Uploads — Bulk product upload service including titles, descriptions, images, and SEO metadata. (120 credits)
  • 📈 Conversion Optimization — Data-driven optimization of your e-commerce store to increase sales and reduce cart abandonment. (320 credits)
  • 🎨 Logo Design — Custom logo design with multiple concepts, revisions, and complete brand-ready file package. (120 credits)

Subscription Plans

Choose a plan that fits your needs:

  • Starter — £99/month, 100 credits, 5–7 day turnaround. View plan
  • Professional — £199/month, 250 credits, 3–5 day turnaround, priority queue. View plan
  • Enterprise — £299/month, 500 credits, 1–3 day turnaround, VIP support. View plan
